category_sources: Official GitHub README describes MDB Tools as tools and libraries to read and write MDB/ACCDB database files.
source_facts.description says these tools facilitate use of Microsoft Access databases.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses MDB Tools naming.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents utilities, requirements, installation, and says each program has a man page for usage.
Official repository includes a doc directory for project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mdbtools/mdbtools; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists mdb-export, mdb-schema, mdb-sql, ODBC support, and MDB/ACCDB files.
source_facts.description and executables identify Access database command-line tools.
